traits.locale_text:
The user can equip two-handed melee weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws), but deals −15% less damage and can perform only basic attacks with them.
Melee attacks made with a two-handed weapon in this hand force targets to pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|c8ec9ba03016401eb1ecfe91688dd67e} penalty or become staggered for 1 round.
The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).

The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws), but deals −15% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and can perform only basic attacks with them.
Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by melee attacks made with a two-handed weapon in this hand must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|c8ec9ba03016401eb1ecfe91688dd67e} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} or become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
